title: Slime Jump
description: Jump on top of the slimes!
body:
What's the point of being able to jump on a slime block, but not on a slime? With this mod you will be able to jump on top of slimes, completely changing the way you play Minecraft.
A water drop? That's too old school, better a slime drop!

Ready to play with your friends on the best hosting?

I recommend Bisect Hosting for playing with friends because of their high-quality, lag-free servers. You can install any CurseForge modpack or your custom mods without errors. Plus, their support is available 24/7 to help with any issues. Use my code to get a 25% discount on your purchase.

Transform your Minecraft experience with the Slime Jump Mod! Now you can bounce on slimes just like slime blocks, opening up endless fun possibilities. Create slime paths, build mega elevators, or master the ultimate slime drop—say goodbye to boring water drops! This small tweak revolutionizes how you move and play in Minecraft.
